description: Create a GitHub Actions CI workflow that runs on push to master branch for specific file paths and on pull requests to master for the same paths. The workflow should also be triggerable manually. It should have a concurrency policy that cancels in-progress jobs when the reference changes. The workflow should have two jobs, one for Linux and one for Windows, each with a matrix strategy for different build types and compilers. For Linux, use an ubuntu-latest environment with a Debian testing container, install dependencies, check a TOML header, configure Meson, build, and test. For Windows, use a Windows 2022 environment, install dependencies, configure Meson, build, and test.
